name: orbitron-tui
description: A modular TUI backend for Orbitron

scripts.build: bun build --compile src/cli.js --outfile dist/orbitron && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const wrapper=['#!/usr/bin/env node','import path from \"node:path\";','import { spawnSync } from \"node:child_process\";','const bin = path.join(import.meta.dirname, \"..\", \"dist\", \"orbitron\");','const result = spawnSync(bin, process.argv.slice(2), { stdio: \"inherit\" });','process.exit(result.status ?? 0);',''].join(\"\n\");fs.writeFileSync('bin/orbitron.mjs',wrapper);fs.chmodSync('bin/orbitron.mjs',0o755);fs.copyFileSync('bin/orbitron.mjs','bin/ob.mjs');" && bun build src/main.tsx --outdir dist --target bun && cp src/lib/ca-bundle.pem dist/lib/ca-bundle.pem || true

author: johndih
